title: Jar Bottle Opener Non Slip Jar Gripper - Pad Rubber Jar Can Lid Opener,5 in 1 Multi Function Non-Slip Opener for Weak,Senior, Arthritis Hands (3-piece set)
description:
About this item
4-in-1 Jar opener: Designed ergonomic and easy to use with 4 defferent jar grips.Multiple jaw size fits most jar/bottle lid or cap.Ensure safety even if your hands are wet, not worries about weak hands or arthritis sufferers,Non slip grip and rubber inside grip wich helps open even the most stubborn jar and bottle lids.
5-in-1 Bottle operer:5 in 1 bottle opener is suitable for opening water bottles which have short tops and are hard to grip.a bottle opener takes off bottle caps, a screw top opener assists with water bottle and soda tops, a pull tab hook pulls off can tops, a tab nook opens soda cans and a jar hook breaks the air tight seal of hard to open jar lids.it makes us avoid the risk of using a knife to open the lid and lower the chance of hurting.
Non Slip Jar Opener Gripper Pad:This is made of high quality food-grade silicone, non-slip, flexible and high resistance that can help you open jar or bottle easily.Non slip gripper pad provide superior grip when opening stubborn jars and Prevent objects from sliding even with wet hands.
Wide application:Designed for small hands, seniors or anyone who suffers from arthritis. easy grip handle great for wet jars, wet hands, limited hand strength mobility and hand injuries. practical,durable,convenient,save your time and strength,suitable for children, seniors and women.a set of multi-function stainless bottle opener and silicone jar opener will give your hands the power to open any jar lids, bottle caps or cans seal just in a breeze.
Packaging information: you will receive 1 pcs 4- in- 1 Jar opener,1 pcs 5-in-1 Bottle operer and Non Slip Jar Opener Gripper Pad,These tools can be easily stored or hung anywhere without regular maintenance, reusable and useful, It is an indispensable multifunctional kitchen tool in life,enough to meet your daily family needs; it can also be used as a great gift for parents, grandparents, girlfriends, other colleagues and friends.
reviews_5s:
This is my second bottle opener made like this. This one has additional items for opening other things but it is the bottle opener you will love! I have worn the smallest opening one down to the plastic. This product is well made. Even though it is plastic, it still makes it even easier to use than some heavy ones.
I do not have a great deal of muscle mass left in my hands. Trying to open anything is a chore for me but I am blessed with a strong husband and if I can't use him, the bottle opener is perfect. I find it works best on the first 2-3 openings. The large one does not give me the traction I need to remove lids from things like pickles or mayonnaise.
Try it. I promise you will reach for it more times than you would think. When you have worn down the one for coke bottle sized lids, they have more here on Amazon to replace it. Great product if you need the help.I purchased the above products over a year ago and still use everyday, very useful. I highly recommend for small hands and seniors. Jar bottle opener, the rubber grip and the 5 n 1 tool are excellent. A must have gadget in your kitchen.I have arthritis and neuropathy in one hand. This great and a must for any kitchen.This is my 3rd hope lasts a long timeAs someone with multiple arthritis/tendinitis issues of the hands, this is a great item! Wasn’t sure all of the utensils would be used, but believe it or not I think I have used each one at least once. And they work! I was skeptical, but now I’m grateful. Highly recommend!What can I say. Arthritis is making some things more difficult. I was looking for a replacement for my rubber jar gripper that was getting pretty nasty and when I saw the versatility of having a 5 in 1 combination at this price my lifelong love of multi tools kicked in. Very happy with the purchase.After a fall a couple of years ago, my hands aren’t able to open caps and jars very well. This set is great to use for almost any type of lid. Wish I’d had them long ago. Would definitely recommend!Gift for mom. She is 76 has problems with some opening of jars etc. She said these helped a lot.The most used item in my kitchenLove them to help with opening jars and bottles. Gave them as gift to my sisters. They love them too.
reviews_1s:
I purchased two of these units for a relative that is experiencing difficulty with opening jars and bottles. One was for upstairs and the other was for the kitchen. Specifically, the larger opener for lids is very uncomfortable due to the amount of force / grip required to remove twist off lids and caps. On one of the two units the opener slides around the lid and will not remove it. The design is poor and the functionality is even poorer. Within two days both openers were in the trash and headed to the local landfill. To call the large opener junk would be slanderous to real junk.I live alone and sometimes struggle to open jars. I had high hopes for this item, and regret that I did not get around to using it in time to send it back. It does not open up as wide as I thought it would, so there are quite a few size jars it won’t work on at all, and the two I tried it on were regular sized pasta lids, and with all my strength I still could not get the lid off. I am very frustrated by this, and hope that I can find something in the future that will help me open some of these jars.I was very excited when i got this. But it broke into two pieces on second usage.This product is not big enough to open Mason jars. I purchased it to open Mason Jars, it is technically able to open wide enough to grasp a Mason Jar, but then you need gigantic hands to hold the tool. If I had gigantic hands, I wouldn't need this tool. Even when I tried to squeeze it on a Mason jar, it slipped off. This tool is for small jars. This product claims to open jars, makes no mention that it's for small-jars only. Deceptive.Notice there is no hinge at the top. If your item doesn't fit the holes given and squeezing it still doesn't grasp the lid so you can turn it, you are up the proverbial creek. Here's what you want instead:

https://smile.amazon.com/Function-Silicone-Children-Arthritis-Sufferers/dp/B08MXNC778/ref=sr_1_20?crid=2WR79L1OIPF9O&keywords=jar+opener&qid=1641505799&sprefix=jar+opener%2Caps%2C96&sr=8-20

Notice that some of the colors are the SAME opener as this one. Others have the hinge. mbIt does not work well for me.Went to use it for the first time and it just slid on the bottle. The rubber part of the jar opener started to come off the first time I tried to open something. Very disappointed.They cannot open cans and bottles.jar opener is so hard to pull apart to put on jars, didn't work. the flat rubber to help open anything from jars to bottle caps was so thick didn't work.None of this product works I have rheumatoid arthritis and my hands and this plastic the taser made of is very hard to squeeze a bottle opener does not fit on bottles properly and the mat moves to slide all over the place
